import openai


def summarize_documents(docs: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    summaries = []
    for doc in docs:
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model="gpt-4",
            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": f"Summarize: {doc}"}],
        )
        summaries.append(response.choices[0].message.content)
    return summaries


def classify_reviews(reviews: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    labels = []
    for review in reviews:
        resp = client.chat.completions.create(
            model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": f"Classify: {review}"}],
        )
        labels.append(resp.choices[0].message.content)
    return labels


def translate_batch(texts: list[str], target_lang: str) -> list[str]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    results = []
    for text in texts:
        completion = client.chat.completions.create(
            model="gpt-4",
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": f"Translate to {target_lang}"},
                {"role": "user", "content": text},
            ],
        )
        results.append(completion.choices[0].message.content)
    return results
